name: Build LineageOS 23 (kernel 5.15.196)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      branch:
        description: 'Repo branch to build (default: lineage-23.0)'
        required: false
        default: 'lineage-23.0'
      defconfig:
        description: 'Kernel defconfig to use (e.g., rtw0_defconfig)'
        required: true
        default: ''
      clang_url:
        description: 'Optional URL to an Android clang tarball (leave blank to use system clang)'
        required: false
        default: ''

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 120
    steps:
    - name: Checkout kernel repo
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        repository: JWEB0689/android_kernel_motorola_sm8550
        ref: ${{ github.event.inputs.branch }}
        fetch-depth: 1

    - name: Install build packages
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y build-essential bc bison flex libssl-dev libelf-dev rsync unzip python3 zip curl clang

    - name: Setup optional Android clang
      if: ${{ github.event.inputs.clang_url != '' }}
      run: |
        sudo mkdir -p /opt/clang
        curl -L "${{ github.event.inputs.clang_url }}" -o /tmp/clang.tar.xz
        sudo tar -xJf /tmp/clang.tar.xz -C /opt/clang --strip-components=1
        echo "/opt/clang/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH

    - name: Configure environment
      run: |
        echo "ARCH=arm64" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "O=out" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "DEFCONFIG=${{ github.event.inputs.defconfig }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Prepare output directory
      run: |
        mkdir -p out

    - name: Generate config
      run: |
        set -e
        if [ -z "${DEFCONFIG}" ]; then
          echo "ERROR: DEFCONFIG is empty. Set the workflow input 'defconfig' to your device defconfig."
          exit 1
        fi
        make O="$O" "${DEFCONFIG}"

    - name: Build kernel
      run: |
        set -ex
        if command -v clang >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Using clang from PATH"
          make -j$(nproc) O="$O" CC=clang HOSTCC=gcc
        else
          make -j$(nproc) O="$O" HOSTCC=gcc
        fi

    - name: Prepare AnyKernel3 and package
      run: |
        ANYK=AnyKernel3
        rm -rf $ANYK
        git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/osm0sis/AnyKernel3.git $ANYK
        rm -rf $ANYK/.git

        if [ -f "$O/arch/arm64/boot/Image" ]; then
          cp "$O/arch/arm64/boot/Image" $ANYK/Image
        elif [ -f "$O/arch/arm64/boot/Image.gz" ]; then
          cp "$O/arch/arm64/boot/Image.gz" $ANYK/Image
        else
          echo "Error: kernel Image not found in $O/arch/arm64/boot/"
          ls -la "$O/arch/arm64/boot/" || true
          exit 1
        fi

        ZIP_NAME="lineage-23-5.15.196-${{ github.event.inputs.branch }}-${{ github.event.inputs.defconfig }}.zip"
        cd $ANYK
        zip -r9 "../${ZIP_NAME}" ./*
        cd ..

    - name: Upload AnyKernel zip artifact
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: anykernel-zip
        path: |
          AnyKernel3/*.zip
